name: Fig Envelopes
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour and mix with baking powder, salt, and sugar.
2. Cut in shortening using two spatulas until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Gradually add milk to form a soft dough. Turn onto lightly floured surface.
4. Roll out the dough into a rectangle about 1/4 inch thick.
5. Cut into 4-inch squares.
6. Place 2 tablespoons of chopped figs on half of each square.
7. Moisten the edges with cold milk.
8. Fold and press the edges together to seal.
9. Brush the tops with egg mixture (1 tablespoon milk and 1 teaspoon sugar).
10. Place on a lightly oiled baking sheet.
11. Bake in a hot oven (450°F) for 20 minutes.
